# WBS Project v1 - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
Simple web application with HTML frontend and Python Flask backend, with PostgreSQL database support.

## Setup Steps
- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file
- [x] Get project setup information
- [ ] Scaffold the project structure
- [ ] Install dependencies
- [ ] Compile and test
- [ ] Create and run task
- [ ] Documentation complete

## Project Details
- **Frontend**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- **Backend**: Python Flask
- **Database**: PostgreSQL (to be added later)
